mapper.select: SELECT product_id as productId , product_name as productName , brand_name as brandName , price , original_price as originalPrice , discount_rate as discountRate , product_url as productUrl FROM t_product WHERE product_id = #{productId}

SELECT product_id as productId , product_name as productName , brand_name as brandName , price , original_price as originalPrice , discount_rate as discountRate , product_url as productUrl FROM t_product WHERE brand_name = #{brandName} ORDER BY product_id DESC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT p.product_id as productId , p.product_name as productName , p.brand_name as brandName , p.price , p.original_price as originalPrice , p.discount_rate as discountRate , p.product_url as productUrl , ROUND(AVG(r.rating), 2) as avgRating , COUNT(r.review_id) as reviewCount FROM t_product p JOIN t_review r ON p.product_id = r.product_id GROUP BY p.product_id, p.product_name, p.brand_name, p.price , p.original_price, p.discount_rate, p.product_url HAVING COUNT(r.review_id) >= 5 ORDER BY avgRating DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{limit}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT p.product_id as productId , p.product_name as productName , p.brand_name as brandName , p.price , p.original_price as originalPrice , p.discount_rate as discountRate , p.product_url as productUrl , ROUND(AVG(r.rating), 2) as avgRating , COUNT(r.review_id) as reviewCount FROM t_product p JOIN t_review r ON p.product_id = r.product_id GROUP BY p.product_id, p.product_name, p.brand_name, p.price , p.original_price, p.discount_rate, p.product_url ORDER BY reviewCount DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{limit}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT p.product_id as productId , p.product_name as productName , p.brand_name as brandName , p.price , p.original_price as originalPrice , p.discount_rate as discountRate , p.product_url as productUrl , ROUND(AVG(r.rating), 2) as avgRating , COUNT(r.review_id) as reviewCount FROM t_product p JOIN t_review r ON p.product_id = r.product_id WHERE r.skin_type LIKE '%' || #{skinType} || '%' GROUP BY p.product_id, p.product_name, p.brand_name, p.price , p.original_price, p.discount_rate, p.product_url HAVING COUNT(r.review_id) >= 3 ORDER BY avgRating DESC, reviewCount DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{limit}

SELECT ROUND(AVG(rating), 2) as avgRating , COUNT(*) as reviewCount , SUM(CASE WHEN sentiment = '긍정' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as posCnt , SUM(CASE WHEN sentiment = '중립' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as neuCnt , SUM(CASE WHEN sentiment = '부정' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as negCnt , SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as r5 , SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as r4 , SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as r3 , SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as r2 , SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as r1 FROM t_review WHERE product_id = #{productId}

SELECT review_id as reviewId , product_id as productId , nickname , review_date as reviewDate , rating , skin_type as skinType , skin_tone as skinTone , review_text as reviewText , helpful , sentiment FROM t_review WHERE product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY helpful DESC, review_id DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_review WHERE product_id = #{productId}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.product_id) as productCount , ROUND(AVG(r.rating), 2) as avgRating , COUNT(r.review_id) as totalReviews FROM t_product p LEFT JOIN t_review r ON p.product_id = r.product_id WHERE p.brand_name = #{brandName}

SELECT p.product_id as productId , p.product_name as productName , p.brand_name as brandName , p.price , p.original_price as originalPrice , p.discount_rate as discountRate , p.product_url as productUrl , ROUND(AVG(r.rating), 2) as avgRating , COUNT(r.review_id) as reviewCount FROM t_product p LEFT JOIN t_review r ON p.product_id = r.product_id WHERE p.brand_name = #{brandName} GROUP BY p.product_id, p.product_name, p.brand_name, p.price, p.original_price, p.discount_rate, p.product_url ORDER BY reviewCount DESC
